title: The Dark Eye: Chains of Satinav

notes: Visionaire configuration tool does not run, but the game itself runs without any issue.  Only settings configuration tool allows toggling which are not available via the in-game menu are "Texture Compression", "Scaling Method", and "Open Inventory by Clicking"
title: The Dark Eye: Chains of Satinav

notes: Played through the game without any issues whatsoever. Never played it on Windows, so I cannot tell if I missed anything that should be there.
title: The Dark Eye: Chains of Satinav

notes:
Switched to windowed since I had problems with tabbing out of full screen. When tabbing out, I got stuck on a black screen and could do nothing. Had to connect through ssh and kill the game. But it works perfectly in windowed mode.

I can confirm that the configurator tool doesn't work. Since it is only useful when the game doesn't work at all. I just is a graphical editor for the config.ini file. All settings can also be configured in-game.

The ini file can be found here (not sure if the path is always the same in proton)
~/.steam/steam/steamapps/compatdata/203830/pfx/drive_c/users/steamuser/Local Settings/Application Data/Daedalic Entertainment/Satinav
title: The Dark Eye: Chains of Satinav
